title: bidens ostruthioides var. costaricensis
intro: Bidens ostruthioides var. costaricensis is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, native to Central America, and is also known as Costarican or Coatepec Bidens. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic activities. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain, and aiding in the treatment of wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Bidens ostruthioides var. costaricensis is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
